title: Imperial Garrisons

"'''Imperial Garrisons'''" was an article written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]] for the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|Roleplaying Game]] that appeared in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 12|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 12]]. It provided details on Imperial [[IM-455 modular garrison|prefabricated garrison bases]] from the perspective of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Viran Qol]].

===Collected in===
